turn_info.content: Well not too great really. I am on furlough from my job because of the lockdown.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It has been happening for most of 2020. I briefly returned to work but now I am furloughed again! What should I do?

results.term: I get a certain amount of my salary but it is not ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I get a certain amount of my salary but it is not enough to pay for all my expenses. Additionally I am feeling really bad about the fact that I can't leave home very often.

results.term: I think it is a combination of both but - perhaps ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I think it is a combination of both but - perhaps mostly the money worries. It would be ironic if we were to be made homeless at a time when we're not legally supposed to be outside for very long!

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: We can just about scrape by on our mortgage but we were really struggling on other monthly expenses and are worried that some of them might not be paid by the bank.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have not really thought about reaching out to any of the people that we have to pay because I am afraid that they might not be sympathetic. Do you think it would be a good idea?

results.term: I suppose that I probably do not have anything to ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I suppose that I probably do not have anything to lose - all that they can say is that they won't help us!

turn_info.content: This is very true. It does help to realise that I am not the only person in this position right now!

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have been keeping in touch with friends and family on social media. It is a lifeline but I would still really prefer to be back out there at work!

turn_info.content: Do you think that this situation is going to be over anytime soon? It would really make a difference to me to think that it was.

turn_info.content: Well yes but the twenties were followed by the Great Depression - I am not sure how encouraging that is :D

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: This is true - perhaps with the vaccine we can get back to normal sooner than later.
